form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since winning post a big 5 len win. Pontefract October 20 over 1200m slow track defeating Marseillan with 60.5kg at $3.80. On debut second last of 9 at Ripon August 25 over 1200m, 18 len behind Chale Chalo carrying 60.5kg at $15. One of the leading chances.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 46-day let-up. First-up after four months 3rd of 12 at Lingfield All Weather on February 27 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Saffron Dandy with 51.5kg at $29. Previously second-up 7th of 10 at Windsor on June 30 over 1020m, 10 len behind Irish Fighter carrying 60.5kg at $81. Fitter for that run and will be tough to beat.
